blended.narrative: Hogadon is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,391 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 18".
